message:
Compute sha256 from unified transcript instead of raw

The sha256 hash used for deduplication is now computed from the unified
transcript rather than the raw transcript. This ensures that changes
to converter logic are detected and uploaded, since previously changes
to conversion would result in

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/igil2f1yocji4s5kmujiadz2"unchanged" status because the raw
transcript hadn't changed.
